name: Skeena Resources Limited
description: Skeena Resources Limited is a Canadian mining exploration and development company focused on revitalizing the past-producing Eskay Creek gold-silver mine located in the Golden Triangle of northwest British Columbia, Canada. The company is dedicated to developing high-grade precious metal projects with a strong emphasis on environmental stewardship and community engagement. Skeena's primary asset, Eskay Creek, was once the world's highest-grade gold mine and is currently being advanced through the development stage toward production, supported by robust economics and significant exploration potential in a world-class mining jurisdiction.
